metadata.description: Claude Cowork Consultants plugin marketplace. Audit, planning, GTM, operations, buyback, and business validation plugins built for AI-first consultants and marketing agencies.

plugins.name: ccc-planning
plugins.description: CCC daily operating system. Structured daily check-ins, daily checkouts, weekly planning, 90-day sprints, and session handoff prep — all designed for solo founders and fractional executives running an AI-first business.

plugins.name: ccc-audits
plugins.description: Full-stack audit toolkit for AI consultants and marketing agencies. Covers LinkedIn profiles, Instagram, SEO, WordPress SEO implementation, Google My Business, and Google Search Console — each producing a scored, actionable report.

plugins.name: ccc-gtm
plugins.description: Go-to-market system for AI-first marketing agencies. Runs a structured GTM discovery session to define ICP, positioning, and offer — then produces a phased 90-day launch plan with weekly actions and a clear revenue hypothesis.

plugins.name: ccc-operations
plugins.description: CCC internal operations toolkit. Two public skills: SOP Creator (HEROIC-format SOPs) and Skill Creator Pro (full Claude skill engineering loop). Framework Extractor moved to the second-brain plugin as of v1.6.0 — it is a knowledge-extraction tool and belongs with the Second Brain stack.

plugins.name: ccc-buyback
plugins.description: Dan Martell's Buyback Principle applied to AI-first consultants. Audit your time, build a replacement ladder, plan your perfect week, define your preloaded year, and align your vision — all structured for founders reclaiming their time.

plugins.name: 48hr-launch-blueprint
plugins.description: Five-skill business validation toolkit based on Noah Kagan's Million Dollar Weekend. Guides users from idea generation through offer crafting to getting 3 paying customers in 48 hours — before building anything. Mindset Reset, Idea Generator, Business Model Validator, Dream Ten Launcher, and Validation Debrief.

plugins.name: second-brain
plugins.description: Second Brain tools for the cognitive-exoskeleton era. Ten skills: Second Brain Setup & Audit (five-folder Layer-1 substrate + Three Brains framework + operation-readiness diagnostics), Knowledge Distill (URL/YouTube → key-idea notes with thinker profiles), Knowledge Archive (full-text archiving + bulk publication feed), Second Brain Connect (runs Simmons' 9 cognitive operations against vault clusters and returns human-approved connection proposals), Framework Extractor (decodes books/courses/frameworks into structured Claude Cowork Skills via 5-phase decode-build-audit-architect workflow), CCC Mental Model Recipes (vault-grounded fork with dual-mode output and attribution-clean Lens/Recipe handling), Frontier Prompting (Pattern Bridge / Void Space / Quantum Leap question design from Simmons' course), Third Brain Mastery (Five Stages curriculum daily-delivery mechanism), Video Ingest (split-format course recordings → vault markdown with Whisper transcripts, OCR slide text, pHash deduplication), and Specialized Profile Builder (Simmons Class 2 architecture — produces 7-dimensional operator-domain Specialized Memory Profiles via Disconfirming Evidence Questioning across 2 MVP branches).

plugins.name: ccc-cashflow-management
plugins.description: Complete Profit First cashflow management system for consultants and business owners. Run Instant Assessments, set up multi-account structures, classify expenses with the PRUN Formula, execute quarterly reviews with profit distribution, optimize across 12 Profit Points, generate client reports, onboard consulting clients, and prepare Cashflow Control workshops.

plugins.name: ccc-ai-audit
plugins.description: AI Automation Audit toolkit for CCC consulting engagements. Five skills covering the full audit lifecycle: entry routing, scoped discovery with process documentation, VALUE opportunity scoring with solution matching, professional audit report generation, and tiered commercial proposal creation. Based on the 5-Phase AI Audit Framework. Guides consultants through real-world audit engagements that span multiple sessions across days — including stakeholder interviews, process walkthroughs, and data collection between sessions.

plugins.name: ccc-sales-process
plugins.description: Daniel's end-to-end Gap-Selling-grounded sales process for CCC consulting engagements: pre-call preparation with Current/Future-state hypotheses + Kanter-threat objection mapping, discovery-roleplay rehearsal scoring against the 4-step discovery + CRM Challenge, post-call logging with Behavioural Signals + Pipeline State (Current / Future / Gap / Intrinsic Motivation / Decision Criteria / Buying Process / Next Yes), gap-anchored proposal drafting with HTML-to-PDF rendering, value-based pricing analysis, and deal-rescue messaging using the I'm-confused-you-said reframe for stalled, dark, and price-objection situations. Built on Keenan's Gap Selling (2018) integrated with CCC's Problem Identification Chart.

plugins.name: ccc-seo-suite
plugins.description: CCC SEO AI Suite — full-stack AI-native SEO operation for non-technical teams. Two-layer architecture: 16 atomic skills (engineering substrate) + 6 user-task orchestrators + entry router + 2 artifact/audit skills. Closed GSC learning loop with cohort attribution + per-platform AI citation tracking + multi-content-type / multi-language first-class. Includes engagement-start rescue mode for clients arriving with substantial existing content (50-500 articles from previous agency / in-house work). Built on top of the BenAI marketplace SEO stack with significant CCC extensions for compounding quality.
